scripts.db:down: echo 'native postgres — leave running (brew services stop postgresql@16 to halt)'
scripts.db:reset: psql postgres://flowtrack:flowtrack@localhost:5432/postgres -c 'drop database if exists flowtrack' && psql postgres://flowtrack:flowtrack@localhost:5432/postgres -c 'create database flowtrack' && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
